title: App Settings - General - Licenses - Source
scenario: Verify that tapping each Source link in the Licenses section opens the corresponding license page on github.com.
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to General > App Settings.
3. For each individual license listed, tap on its Source link.
4. Observe the page that opens after tapping the link.
expected: Tapping on each Source link opens github.com with the corresponding license page.
